subject: Re: Greg Hersch
body:
no interst

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Greg Hersch called and advised that he is getting a
lot of pressure to find
out by today or tomorrow the latest what amount(s),
if any, you or your
entities are going to invest in the AAM Emerging
Managers, LP/AAM Emerging Managers
Offshore, LP funds. Greg said he does not need
money or docs by tomorrow
but he does need a definitive commitment by tomorrow
if you are going to
invest.

Please advise.

Darren
